title: rubus menkei var. scalarostachys
intro: Rubus menkei var. scalarostachys, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Mountain Raspberry, is a variant of the Rubus menkei plant species, belonging to the Rosaceae family. It is a type of shrub native to the Himalayan region, prized for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is rich in antioxidants, flavonoids, and tannins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and digestive problems. Rubus menkei var. scalarostachys is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in herbal supplements to support overall well-being.
